title: words-to-avoid
description: Schema for content/dist/words-to-avoid.json. CI-derived from content/src/writing/words-to-avoid.md by scripts/content/derive-content.js. Each rule captures the avoid token list (lowercased, quoted words extracted from the Example column), a human-readable reason, and a do/dont example pair. Advisory rows (no quoted terms in the Example column) carry avoid: [].

_schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Bumps require coordinated deriver + consumer updates.

_source.description: Repo-relative path to the source markdown file this artifact was derived from.

rules.description: Ordered list of words-to-avoid rules, one per table row in the source file.

items.description: A single words-to-avoid rule parsed from one table row.

avoid.description: Lowercased token(s) to avoid, extracted from quoted terms in the Example column. Empty array for advisory rows (no quoted terms).

items.description: A single lowercased word or phrase to avoid.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale for avoiding the term(s), sourced from the Example column verbatim.

example.description: A do/dont example pair illustrating the rule in practice.

do.description: A preferred phrasing (the Do column from the source table).

dont.description: The discouraged phrasing (the Don't column from the source table).
